description: In “Whistler,” a surprise encounter at the Met changes the course of their lives.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Man Who Read Everything: The Literary Letters of Harold Bloom’
book_title: ‘The Man Who Read Everything: The Literary Letters of Harold Bloom’
description: A collection of Harold Bloom’s letters details the working life of one of America’s most influential intellects.
In “1873,” the historian and financier Liaquat Ahamed traces the political consequences of booming markets that left a lot of people behind.
